description: Accountability- a discipline-first app designed to transform ambitions into measurable execution

features.name: App Launch
features.description: Show the sign in screen with Google Sign In button
features.evidence: npx expo start first shows the Sign In screen

features.name: Calendar view
features.description: Shows the Google Calendar view with grid day view

features.name: Task Tab
features.description: Shows the list of the tasks for the day set in the calendar view. Sets to unfinished tasks of the previous day or sets to empty the next day

features.name: App Block Popup
features.description: A popup listing all the installed apps on the device and a checkbox beside the apps to check to block the selected apps. Should double-confirm before blocking the app
features.evidence: User should be able to upload proofs

features.name: App Blocking
features.description: Blocking of selected apps- displaying an overlay over the selected apps after confirmed blocking -both for android and ios.
features.evidence: User should be able to upload proofs

features.name: Verification Engine
features.description: Should verify the proof provided by the user. The placeholder uploading proofs should exist alongside of the tasks in the Task Tab.
features.evidence: User should be able to upload proofs
